data.name: Virtual Reality Girls
data.detailed_description:
Virtual Reality Girls is experience for people which admire beauty.
Sit comfortably in your armchair, put on VR googles and transfer yourself to terrace located in the middle of big metropolis, feel and marvel at the city at night. Play around as choreographer, pick outfit, dance type and surrounding for the beautiful female dancer. Look on evaluate your choices. During show you can control the time. Slow down the animation or stop it absolutely. We also recommend this experience for people which would like to look closer at perfect motions of human body inside virtual reality. There are three premade experiences or ability to do custom setup at one's disposal.

The night falls, the city is starting to shine with it's own light.
Reflected by the windows of skyscrapers.
The magic of the night is starting to rise.
You have opportunity to give closer look at this mystery spectacle.
Sense this vibe from your terrace.
Sit comfortably and admire the view.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 (or better)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-4590 (or equivalent)
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce GTX 970 (or equivalent)
  • 儲存空間: 1000 MB 可用空間
  • VR 支援: SteamVR
  • 備註: VR
